query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.totalAmount, o.subtotal, o.gstAmount, o.deliveryCharge, o.orderType, o.userId, o.customerName, o.customerPhone
FROM orders o 
WHERE o.orderNumber IN ('79', '83', '84', '00079', '00083', '00084')
ORDER BY o.id;
